programme.title: Drive Tv
programme.desc: (G) A scenic route that's a short trip from Brisbane. Trent takes a perfect city EV, country on the perfect day trip around Lake Wivenhoe in Queensland. We go city to country in a day

programme.title: Drive Tv
programme.desc: Drive provides automotive reviews, car culture stories, and expert insights on vehicles and the motoring industry.

programme.title: Drive Tv: Vehicle Insights
programme.desc: Drive provides automotive reviews, car culture stories, and expert insights on vehicles and the motoring industry.

programme.title: Drive Tv: What Drives Us
programme.desc: (G) Join Kris Smith as he speaks to industry experts to discover the latest vehicles, technology, and news. In this episode, we look at the lay of the automotive space in 2026.
